name: PRINCESS-UMANDA
description: A feature-rich WhatsApp bot by Mihiranga

PREFIX.description: Choose your command prefix for the bot

AUTO_REPLY_MESSAGE.description: Set the auto-reply message when the bot is unavailable
AUTO_REPLY_MESSAGE.value: I am currently unavailable. Please leave a message!

YTDL_QUALITY.description: Set the quality for YouTube downloads (highestaudio/highestvideo)

YTDL_FILTER.description: Set the filter for YouTube downloads (audioandvideo/audioonly)

DOWNLOAD_PATH.description: Path where YouTube downloads will be stored

MAX_DOWNLOAD_SIZE.description: Maximum file size (in MB) for YouTube downloads

STICKER_MAX_SIZE.description: Maximum image size (in MB) for sticker conversion

TTS_RATE.description: Speech rate for Text-to-Speech (1 is normal speed)

ADMIN_PHONE_NUMBERS.description: Comma-separated list of admin phone numbers

BOT_STATUS_SEEN.description: Enable or disable the 'status seen' feature (true/false)

BOT_ALIVE_MESSAGE.description: Message to show when the bot is alive
